DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: ARNOLD I. BERSCHLER, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY. LYNN L. KRIEGER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY. MOTION ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF THE PERSON(S) MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE AND OTHER WITNESSES AND AN INSPECTION IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS MOOT AS DEFENDANT HAS PREVIOUSLY AGREED TO MAKE WITNESSES AVAILABLE FOR DEPOSITION AND FOR PLAINTIFF TO CONDUCT AN INSPECTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO CONFER IN A REASONABLE AND GOOD FAITH ATTEMPT TO INFORMALLY RESOLVE THE MATTER. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT SHALL SUBMIT A DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 2023(C). APPEARANCE REQUIRED. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN

DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: ARNOLD I. BERSCHLER, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY. LYNN L. KRIEGER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY. MOTION ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SUBMIT TARDY EXPERT WITNESS INFORMATION IS GRANTED. THE COURT HAS CONSIDERED THE EXTENT TO WHICH DEFENDANT HAS RELIED ON THE ABSENCE OF AN EXPERT WITNESS LIST AND FINDS THAT DEFENDANT WILL NOT BE PREJUDICED. THE FAILURE TO TIMELY DISCLOSE EXPERT WITNESSES WAS DUE TO MISTAKE AND INADVERTENCE ON THE PART OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO MAKE CAPTAIN STOLLER AVAILABLE IMMEDIATELY FOR DEPOSITION AT A TIME AND PLACE SELECTED BY THE DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT IS GRANTED LEAVE TO DESIGNATE ADDITIONAL EXPERT WITNESSES AND TO ELICIT ADDITIONAL OPINIONS FROM PREVIOUSLY DESIGNATED EXPERTS. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF REIMBURSE DEFENDANT FOR THE COSTS OF OPPOSING THE MOTION TO SUBMIT TARDY EXPERT WITNESS INFORMATION AND TO PAY ALL EXPENSES CONNECTED WITH THE DEPOSITION OF CAPTAIN STOLLER. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT SHALL SUBMIT A DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 2023(C). COMM: BRUCE CHAN

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-05-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
ARNOLD I. BERSCHLER, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Melanie Sciacca
RICHARD C. WOOTTON, Esq. and LYNN L. KRIEGER, Esq. on behalf of defendant Hornblower Yachts, Inc.

The parties reached a settlement. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Plaintiff Melanie Sciacca to receive $5,000.00 with release of all claims. Plaintiff will dismiss action with prejudice. All parties agreed to the settlement.

Hon. John Munter; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Lok; Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, 956 (206)
